dimensions.name: Data Governance Strategy
dimensions.evidence: Basic policy document exists but not reviewed since 2023. No stewards formally assigned.
dimensions.next_level_target: Formal framework documented. Stewards assigned. Partial adoption.

dimensions.name: Metadata Management
dimensions.evidence: Some datasets have README files. No ISO 19115 schema applied.

dimensions.name: Data Quality Management
dimensions.evidence: Manual quality checks on CODs only. No automated pipeline.
dimensions.next_level_target: Automated quality pipeline covering all production datasets. SLAs defined.

dimensions.name: Data Lineage & Provenance
dimensions.evidence: Source documented for CODs. No lineage for field data.
dimensions.next_level_target: Lineage documented manually for key datasets.

dimensions.name: Data Architecture & Integration
dimensions.evidence: PostGIS in use for reference data. Field data in scattered shapefiles.
dimensions.next_level_target: Standardized data models. Automated ETL pipelines. API integrations active.

dimensions.name: Data Security & Classification
dimensions.evidence: Sensitive data flagged informally. No access control enforcement.

dimensions.name: Reference & Master Data Management
dimensions.evidence: OCHA CODs used as reference. Multiple versions of admin boundaries in circulation.
dimensions.next_level_target: Golden record management. Change notification to consumers. Full versioning.

dimensions.name: Data Catalogue & Discovery
dimensions.evidence: SharePoint list exists but last updated 8 months ago.
dimensions.next_level_target: Formal catalogue deployed (CKAN or equivalent). Partially populated.

dimensions.name: Data Lifecycle Management
dimensions.evidence: No formal retention policy. Archived data mixed with active data.
dimensions.next_level_target: Retention policy documented per domain. Partially enforced.

dimensions.name: Governance Culture & Training
dimensions.evidence: Stewards aware of governance needs. No formal training materials.
dimensions.next_level_target: Mandatory onboarding. Regular training. Governance champions in field teams.

notes: Baseline assessment. Priority: establish formal stewardship and automated quality pipeline.
